title: lolium multiflorum var. siculum
intro: Lolium multiflorum var. siculum, also known as Italian ryegrass, is a perennial grass species that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help in reducing pain and inflammation. Italian ryegrass has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving circulation. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal medicine.
